scripts.format: biome format apps packages scripts tests playwright.config.ts
scripts.format:write: biome format --write apps packages scripts tests playwright.config.ts
scripts.lint: biome lint apps packages scripts tests playwright.config.ts
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:backend-packages && tsc --noEmit && npm run typecheck --workspaces --if-present
scripts.test: npm run build:backend-packages && vitest run tests/contracts tests/platform
scripts.contract: npm run contract:check && node scripts/contract-drift-test.mjs && node scripts/contract-test.mjs && node scripts/verify-contract-types.mjs && node scripts/evaluation-check.mjs
scripts.build: npm run build:backend-packages && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.ci: npm run format && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:runtime-integration && npm run test && npm run contract && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run e2e:smoke && npm run security && git diff --check
